message:
⚡ Splash screen, shift+click multi-select, failover group UX (#89)

- Add splash screen with clubTivi icon while DB loads (no more
  'Add Provider' flash on startup)
- Remove loading spinners — UI renders after Phase 0 completes
- Shift+click enters multi-select mode for failover grouping
- Failover group row: tap to play, double-tap to expand/collapse,
  right-click for group actions
- Move expand chevron to right side of failover group row

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
